title: Train Set for Kids Remote Control Train Toys w/Steam Locomotive, Cargo Cars & Luxury Tracks, Electric Trains w/Realistic Smoke,Sounds & Lights, Christmas Birthday Gift for Boys Girls 3 4 5 6 7+…
features: 🚂🎄【2025 Upgraded Luxury USB Rechargeable Electric Remote Control Train Set】: The electric train set comes with remote controller,which has the function of start switch,backward/forward,speed adjustment and trumpet/atomization switch.Upgraded remote controller provides more convenient operation for kids. ENJOY HASSLE-FREE PLAYTIME WITH THIS TRAIN'S BUILT-IN RECHARGEABLE BATTERY—NO EXTRA BATTERIES REQUIRED! CONVENIENTLY CHARGE THE COAL CARRIAGE USING THE INCLUDED USB CABLE. A FULLY CHARGED BATTERY (IN ABOUT 210 MINUTES) WILL PROVIDE APPROXIMATELY 210 MINUTES OF USAGE.

🚂💝【Remote Control - Frequency Operation】: 1. Switch on the train's power supply - observe the front lights flashing. 2. Long-press the remote control for 2-3 seconds until the light remains illuminated, accompanied by audible "beeps" indicating successful pairing. (The front headlights will continue to shine, while the lights on the remote control will go dark). 3. Upon achieving frequency synchronization, proceed with a short press of the power button to set the train in motion. 💝 Should you encounter any difficulties, please don't hesitate to contact our dedicated customer support team.

🚉👊【Steam Locomotive Engine Train Set】: This train set includes 1 steam locomotive, 1 coal carriage,1 fuel tank car and 1 cargo transport vehicle,8pcs straight tracks, 8pcs curved tracks, 4 Y-shaped tracks and 1 cross track to start the fun train games. The train's design is inspired by classic locomotives, which helps to foster an appreciation for history and engineering in children. The train set's colorful design and attention to detail make it visually appealing and engaging for kids.

💡📯【Light,Sound & Smoke ON or OFF 】 The train model is equipped with authentic light, realistic sounds and real smoke,these features create a realistic driving atmosphere.More importantly, you can also use the remote control to turn the "SMOKE" and "WHISTLE" ON or OFF (please refer to the manual for operation). What’s more,the smoke comes from the water, so it is non-toxic and harmless.In the meanwhile,you will use the remote control to achieve “one-button smoke, one-button sound”.

🚃🛤【Versatile Richer Track Shapes For More Fun】: The train set's track pieces are easy to assemble and disassemble, allowing children to customize their playtime experience.You can assemble the railway into various shapes (circular and oval layouts), and lock each train track firmly. Max train tracks size:97"" (L) x 41""(W). then turn on the switch, the train sets will move steadily on the toy track The different track shapes help to develop children's spatial awareness and problem-solving skills.
